briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be run by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — The collapse of fintech middleware firm Synapse left thousands of Americans unable to access their savings, highlighting risks in the Banking-as-a-Service model.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple has acquired UK-based open banking startup Credit Kudos, signalling the tech giant's growing interest in financial data and credit services.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A deep-dive analysis explores how open banking frameworks are reshaping competition in the payments landscape globally.

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News* — Fintech innovation is pushing credit card products into increasingly niche and complex territory, challenging traditional card issuers.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Canada's plan to ban crypto ATMs worries industry, advocates](https://betakit.com/canadas-plan-to-ban-crypto-atms-worries-industry-advocates/)** — *BetaKit* — Canada's proposed ban on cryptocurrency ATMs is raising concerns from industry players and financial inclusion advocates who fear it will cut off access for underserved communities.

- **[Closing the loop: How Mastercard is building for agentic commerce](https://betakit.com/closing-the-loop-how-mastercard-is-building-for-agentic-commerce/)** — *BetaKit* — Mastercard is developing infrastructure to support agentic commerce, where AI agents autonomously execute purchases on behalf of consumers.

- **["The math is not mathing": How AI bubble fears are changing Canadian VC's investment approach](https://betakit.com/the-math-is-not-mathing-how-ai-bubble-fears-are-changing-canadian-vcs-investment-approach/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian venture capitalists are growing more cautious about AI investments as valuation concerns and bubble fears begin to reshape their funding strategies.

- **[Shopify posts strong Q1 revenue growth, but stock still falls on slow growth forecast](https://betakit.com/shopify-posts-strong-revenue-growth-but-stock-still-falls-on-slow-growth-forecast/)** — *BetaKit* — Shopify reported solid Q1 revenue growth but saw its stock decline after issuing a cautious outlook for the remainder of 2026.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — *(Relevant to Canada's ongoing open banking journey)* Canada flagged screen scraping as a security risk and set an open banking implementation target, laying the groundwork for the country's consumer-directed finance framework.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Three European tech founders on why they chose Canada for North American expansion](https://betakit.com/three-european-tech-founders-on-why-they-chose-canada-for-north-american-expansion/)** — *BetaKit* — European tech founders share their reasons for choosing Canada as a North American base, offering useful insights for Atlantic Canadian ecosystem builders looking to attract international fintech talent and companies.

- **[VistaPrint 2026 Small Business Happiness Report: 87% of Canadian Small Business Owners Are Happy and Resilient](https://financialpost.com/pmn/business-wire-news-releases-pmn/vistaprint-2026-small-business-happiness-report-87-of-canadian-small-business-owners-are-happy-and-resilient-proving-passion-outweighs-pressure)** — *Financial Post* — A new report finds the vast majority of Canadian small business owners remain optimistic despite economic pressures, a sentiment relevant to Atlantic Canada's small business-heavy economy and the fintech tools serving them.
